## Version bump

- [ ] Patch (typo / wording / link fix)
- [ ] Minor (new section, new reference, expanded scope)
- [ ] Major (breaking restructure, removed section, changed trigger phrases)

## Checklist

- [ ] `metadata.version` in frontmatter bumped
- [ ] `VERSIONS.md` updated
- [ ] `SKILL.md` still under 500 lines
- [ ] No invented CLI flags / API signatures / config keys
- [ ] No real credentials, hostnames, or user data introduced
